div.p: layer_shared: "" { direction: right style.stroke: transparent style.fill: transparent cpu_features: { direction: down label: "CPU Feature Detection\nsimd_cpu_features.c [M3-M4]" cpu_features_t: { shape: sql_table label: "struct cpu_features_t (32 bytes)" has_sse2: "bool | offset 0x00" has_sse4_1: "bool | offset 0x01" has_avx: "bool | offset 0x02" has_avx2: "bool | offset 0x03" has_fma: "bool | offset 0x04" has_avx512f: "bool | offset 0x05" cache_line_size: "uint32_t | offset 0x08" l1_data_size: "uint32_t | offset 0x0C" l2_cache_size: "uint32_t | offset 0x10" sz: "Total: 32 bytes" } detect_features: { shape: class label: "Feature Detection" +simd_detect_cpu_features(): "cpu_features_t" +simd_has_avx(): "bool" +simd_has_fma(): "bool" +simd_get_features(): "const cpu_features_t*" } } vector_types: { direction: down label: "SIMD Vector Types\n<emmintrin.h> <immintrin.h>" xmm_layout: { shape: sql_table label: "__m128 (SSE) 16 bytes" f0: "float | lane 0 | offset 0x00" f1: "float | lane 1 | offset 0x04" f2: "float | lane 2 | offset 0x08" f3: "float | lane 3 | offset 0x0C" sz: "4 floats | 16 bytes" } ymm_layout: { shape: sql_table label: "__m256 (AVX) 32 bytes" f0_3: "float[4] | low 128 | offset 0x00" f4_7: "float[4] | high 128 | offset 0x10" sz: "8 floats | 32 bytes" } } alignment: { direction: down label: "Memory Alignment Constants" align_table: { shape: sql_table label: "Alignment Constants" SIMD_VECTOR_SIZE: "16 | bytes" PAGE_SIZE: "4096 | 4KB" SIMD_MEMSET_MIN: "16 | scalar fallback" SIMD_STREAM_THRESHOLD: "262144 | 256KB L2" CACHE_LINE: "64 | bytes" } } }

layer_m1: "" { direction: right style.stroke: transparent style.fill: transparent label: "MILESTONE 1: Memory Operations\nsimd_memops.c [M1]" memset_impl: { direction: down label: "simd_memset Implementation" memset_context: { shape: sql_table label: "memset_context_t (48 bytes)" dest_ptr: "unsigned char* | offset 0x00" remaining_bytes: "size_t | offset 0x08" fill_vector: "__m128i | offset 0x10" prologue_bytes: "size_t | offset 0x20" vector_iterations: "size_t | offset 0x28" epilogue_bytes: "size_t | offset 0x30" sz: "Total: 48 bytes | padded to cache line" } memset_func: { shape: class label: "simd_memset simd_memset.c" +simd_memset(dest, c, count): "void*" +simd_memset_stream(dest, c, count): "void*" -create_fill_vector(c): "__m128i" -compute_alignment(dest): "size_t" } } memcpy_impl: { direction: down label: "simd_memcpy Implementation" memcpy_context: { shape: sql_table label: "memcpy_context_t (48 bytes)" dest_ptr: "unsigned char* | offset 0x00" src_ptr: "const unsigned char* | offset 0x08" remaining_bytes: "size_t | offset 0x10" prologue_bytes: "size_t | offset 0x18" vector_iterations: "size_t | offset 0x20" epilogue_bytes: "size_t | offset 0x28" sz: "Total: 48 bytes" } memcpy_func: { shape: class label: "simd_memcpy simd_memcpy.c" +simd_memcpy(dest, src, count): "void*" +simd_memcpy_stream(dest, src, count): "void*" } } memops_intrinsics: { direction: down label: "Core Intrinsics" intrinsics_table: { shape: sql_table label: "SSE2 Memory Intrinsics" load_aligned: "_mm_load_si128 | aligned load" load_unaligned: "_mm_loadu_si128 | any address" store_aligned: "_mm_store_si128 | aligned store" store_unaligned: "_mm_storeu_si128 | any address" stream_store: "_mm_stream_si128 | non-temporal" set1_epi8: "_mm_set1_epi8 | broadcast byte" sfence: "_mm_sfence | memory fence" } } }

layer_m4: "" { direction: right style.stroke: transparent style.fill: transparent label: "MILESTONE 4: Auto-vectorization Analysis\nsimd_autovec_analysis.c [M4]" benchmark_impl: { direction: down label: "Benchmark Framework" benchmark_result: { shape: sql_table label: "benchmark_result_t (256 bytes)" function_name: "const char* | offset 0x00" variant: "const char* | offset 0x08" input_size: "size_t | offset 0x10" times_ns: "int64_t[16] | offset 0x18" run_count: "int | offset 0x98" median_ns: "int64_t | offset 0x9C" mean_ns: "int64_t | offset 0xA4" stddev_ns: "double | offset 0xAC" cv_percent: "double | offset 0xB4" correctness_verified: "bool | offset 0xBC" sz: "Total: ~200 bytes" } benchmark_func: { shape: class label: "Benchmark Harness analysis_benchmark.c" +benchmark_init(env): "int" "+benchmark_function(name, func, ...)": "void" +compute_speedup(baseline, optimized): "double" "+write_results_csv(filename, ...)": "int" } } vec_report: { direction: down label: "Vectorization Reports" vec_report_entry: { shape: sql_table label: "vec_report_entry_t (48 bytes)" source_file: "const char* | offset 0x00" line_number: "int | offset 0x08" function_name: "const char* | offset 0x0C" vectorized: "bool | offset 0x14" vectorization_width: "const char* | offset 0x15" reason: "const char* | offset 0x1D" instruction_set: "const char* | offset 0x25" sz: "Total: 48 bytes" } vec_func: { shape: class label: "Report Parsing vectorization_report.c" "+compile_with_vectorization_report(...)": "int" "+parse_vectorization_report(...)": "int" +find_function_report(entries, name): "entry*" } } scalar_impl: { direction: down label: "Scalar Baselines" scalar_func: { shape: class label: "Scalar Implementations scalar_implementations.c" +scalar_add_arrays(dst, a, b, n): "void" "+scalar_add_arrays_novec(...)": "void" +scalar_dot_product(a, b, n): "float" "+scalar_dot_product_novec(...)": "float" +scalar_conditional_sum(data, n, threshold): "int" } } }

layer_shared.cpu_features.detect_features -> layer_m3.dotproduct_impl.dot_func: "AVX check" layer_shared.cpu_features.detect_features -> layer_m3.matmul_impl.matmul_func: "FMA check" layer_m1.memset_impl.memset_func -> layer_shared.alignment: "alignment constants" layer_m1.memcpy_impl.memcpy_func -> layer_shared.alignment: "alignment constants" layer_m2.strlen_impl.strlen_func -> layer_shared.alignment: "page boundary check" layer_m2.memchr_impl.memchr_func -> layer_shared.alignment: "alignment constants" layer_m3.dotproduct_impl.dot_func -> layer_shared.cpu_features: "dispatch" layer_m3.matmul_impl.matmul_func -> layer_shared.vector_types: "matrix layouts" layer_m4.benchmark_impl.benchmark_func -> layer_m1.memset_impl.memset_func: "benchmark" layer_m4.benchmark_impl.benchmark_func -> layer_m2.strlen_impl.strlen_func: "benchmark" layer_m4.benchmark_impl.benchmark_func -> layer_m3.dotproduct_impl.dot_func: "benchmark" layer_m4.scalar_impl.scalar_func -> layer_m1.memset_impl.memset_func: "compare" layer_m4.scalar_impl.scalar_func -> layer_m3.dotproduct_impl.dot_func: "compare"

milestone_index: { shape: sql_table label: "Milestone Index" m1: "M1 | simd-library-m1 | SSE2 Basics: memset/memcpy with alignment handling" m2: "M2 | simd-library-m2 | String Ops: strlen/memchr with page-boundary safety" m3: "M3 | simd-library-m3 | Math Ops: dot product/matrix with horizontal reduction" m4: "M4 | simd-library-m4 | Auto-vectorization: compiler analysis and benchmarking" }
